title: thelypteris spinulosa var. dilatata
intro: Thelypteris spinulosa var. dilatata, also known as the Dilated Spiny Wood Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris spinulosa var. dilatata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
